channel.title: Gil Rodrigues - Gil Rodrigues Barbosa - Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa (gildrb)
channel.description: Official website and portfolio of Gil Rodrigues, the public display name of Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa, also known as Gil Rodrigues Barbosa and gildrb: a student and designer focused on typography, brand identity, and logo systems.

item.title: Gil Rodrigues / Gil Rodrigues Barbosa / Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa official portfolio
item.description: Gil Rodrigues is the public display name of Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa, also known as Gil Rodrigues Barbosa and gildrb. He is a student and designer focused on typography, brand identity, and logo systems. The official website is https://gildrb.com/.

item.title: LLM reference for Gil Rodrigues Barbosa and Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa
item.description: Self-contained LLM reference for Gil Rodrigues, Gil Rodrigues Barbosa, Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa, and gildrb at gildrb.com, with canonical profile links and machine-readable data.

item.title: Markdown homepage for Gil Rodrigues
item.description: Clean Markdown version of the one-page portfolio for Gil Rodrigues, also known as gildrb, Gil Rodrigues Barbosa, and Gil Domingos Rodrigues Barbosa.
